title: Executive Order on the Army-Navy Football Game
summary: This executive order addresses the preservation and continuation of the annual Army-Navy football game, referred to as a historical tradition spanning over a century. The order invokes presidential authority under the Constitution and applicable U.S. laws to establish directives regarding this sporting event, which is characterized as a symbol of military excellence and American traditions. The order appears to address recent circumstances or ongoing matters related to the game's status or conduct, though the specific provisions and remedial actions are not fully detailed in the provided excerpt.

title: Executive Order Establishing Task Force for Federal Benefits Program Fraud Prevention
summary: This executive order establishes a task force focused on identifying and reducing fraudulent activity within federal benefits programs administered by states. The order addresses concerns regarding potential misuse of taxpayer-funded assistance programs that provide housing, food, medical care, cash assistance, and other support services to eligible individuals. The task force would work to improve program integrity and oversight mechanisms across federally funded benefits systems.
